subject: A Ginyu Force member hurling an energy ball attack in a wide throwing motion
description: A humanoid figure in a throwing pose dominates the frame, arm drawn back as if hurling a projectile. The figure wears white and orange battle armor consistent with Ginyu Force members. The hair appears light-colored or white, and the build is lean rather than bulky. A glowing energy projectile or orb is visible in the motion, consistent with an energy-ball throwing technique. The background shows bright energy effects in white and teal tones. The composition captures the moment of release in a dynamic action pose. The card name 'Crusher Ball' is canonically Jeice's signature move, and the lean build and light hair are consistent with that character, though fine facial details are not clear at this resolution.
foreground: lean humanoid in battle armor, throwing motion with energy projectile
vision_uncertainty: character-identity-uncertain-at-resolution — Jeice suspected from canonical move name and lean build
